mapper.select:
SELECT r.id AS id, r.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.username AS username, rm.id AS roomId, rm.name AS roomName, r.seat_id AS seatId, s.seat_code AS seatCode, r.status AS status, CASE r.status WHEN 0 THEN '已预约' WHEN 1 THEN '使用中' WHEN 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN 3 THEN '用户取消' WHEN 4 THEN '已过期' WHEN 5 THEN '管理员取消' WHEN 6 THEN '违约' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText, r.start_time AS startTime, r.end_time AS endTime, r.actual_start_time AS actualStartTime, r.actual_end_time AS actualEndTime FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON s.room_id = rm.id
ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON s.room_id = rm.id

SELECT r.id AS id, r.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.username AS username, rm.id AS roomId, rm.name AS roomName, r.seat_id AS seatId, s.seat_code AS seatCode, r.status AS status, CASE r.status WHEN 0 THEN '已预约' WHEN 1 THEN '使用中' WHEN 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN 3 THEN '用户取消' WHEN 4 THEN '已过期' WHEN 5 THEN '管理员取消' WHEN 6 THEN '违约' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText, r.start_time AS startTime, r.end_time AS endTime, r.actual_start_time AS actualStartTime, r.actual_end_time AS actualEndTime FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON s.room_id = rm.id WHERE r.status IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON s.room_id = rm.id WHERE r.status IN (0, 1)
